name: Frail older adult urolithin A trial is complete but has no posted results
summary: The completed frailty registry is an important pending evidence item, not efficacy evidence.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06556706 as completed with 26 frail older adults, randomized quadruple-masked urolithin A versus placebo design, actual completion on 2025-04-25, and no posted results in the API view checked on 2026-06-02.
quantitative_note: The registry lists actual enrollment of 26 and primary outcomes of mitochondrial area and cristae density assessed by electron microscopy.
caveats: This is not efficacy evidence until results are posted or published.
Primary outcomes are muscle mitochondrial-quality biomarkers, not functional frailty endpoints.
The registry should be rechecked before publication.
